name: ComponentIndexType
summary: Defines enumerated values to represent component index types.

enum_values.name: InvalidType
enum_values.summary: Not used. This is the default value of the enumeration type.

enum_values.name: BrepVertex
enum_values.summary: Targets a brep vertex index.

enum_values.name: BrepEdge
enum_values.summary: Targets a brep edge index.

enum_values.name: BrepFace
enum_values.summary: Targets a brep face index.

enum_values.name: BrepTrim
enum_values.summary: Targets a brep trim index.

enum_values.name: BrepLoop
enum_values.summary: Targets a brep loop index.

enum_values.name: MeshVertex
enum_values.summary: Targets a mesh vertex index.

enum_values.name: MeshTopologyVertex
enum_values.summary: Targets a mesh topology vertex index.

enum_values.name: MeshTopologyEdge
enum_values.summary: Targets a mesh topology edge index.

enum_values.name: MeshFace
enum_values.summary: Targets a mesh face index.

enum_values.name: MeshNgon
enum_values.summary: Targets a mesh n-gon index.

enum_values.name: InstanceDefinitionPart
enum_values.summary: Targets an instance definition part index.

enum_values.name: PolycurveSegment
enum_values.summary: Targets a polycurve segment index.

enum_values.name: PointCloudPoint
enum_values.summary: Targets a point cloud point index.

enum_values.name: GroupMember
enum_values.summary: Targets a group member index.

enum_values.name: ExtrusionBottomProfile
enum_values.summary: 3d bottom profile curves. Index identifies profile component

enum_values.name: ExtrusionTopProfile
enum_values.summary: 3d top profile curves. Index identifies profile component

enum_values.name: ExtrusionWallEdge
enum_values.summary: 3d wall edge curve. Index/2: identifies profile component Index%2: 0=start, 1=end

enum_values.name: ExtrusionWallSurface
enum_values.summary: Side wall surfaces. Index identifies profile component

enum_values.name: ExtrusionCapSurface
enum_values.summary: Bottom and top cap surfaces. Index 0=bottom, 1=top

enum_values.name: ExtrusionPath
enum_values.summary: Extrusion path (axis line). Index -1=entire path, 0=start point, 1=endpoint

enum_values.name: SubdVertex
enum_values.summary: Targets a SubD vertex pointer Id. Ids are not guaranteed to be sequential.

enum_values.name: SubdEdge
enum_values.summary: Targets a SubD edge pointer Id. Ids are not guaranteed to be sequential.

enum_values.name: SubdFace
enum_values.summary: Targets a SubD face pointer Id. Ids are not guaranteed to be sequential.

enum_values.name: DimLinearPoint
enum_values.summary: Targets a linear dimension point index.

enum_values.name: DimRadialPoint
enum_values.summary: Targets a radial dimension point index.

enum_values.name: DimAngularPoint
enum_values.summary: Targets an angular dimension point index.

enum_values.name: DimOrdinatePoint
enum_values.summary: Targets an ordinate dimension point index.

enum_values.name: DimTextPoint
enum_values.summary: Targets a text point index.

enum_values.name: NoType
enum_values.summary: Targets no specific type.
